# Virginia Authorizes AI Cameras to Enforce Stop Signs

**TL;DR:** Virginia passed a new law allowing automated traffic cameras equipped with artificial intelligence to catch and cite drivers who run stop signs.

Virginia has enacted legislation that permits the use of AI-powered cameras to automatically detect and enforce stop sign violations. The technology could improve traffic safety by deterring dangerous driving behavior at intersections. Chesterfield County may consider implementing the system as part of its traffic enforcement strategy.

**Why it matters:** Chesterfield residents could see increased traffic enforcement at intersections, potentially affecting driving behavior and insurance rates for those cited under the new automated system.

[Read the source at Google News: Virginia Government →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
